title: FhirConfig
description: Specifies how to handle de-identification of a FHIR store.

defaultKeepExtensions.description: The behaviour for handling FHIR extensions that aren't otherwise specified for de-identification. If true, all extensions are preserved during de-identification by default. If false or unspecified, all extensions are removed during de-identification by default.

fieldMetadataList.description: Specifies FHIR paths to match and how to transform them. Any field that is not matched by a FieldMetadata is passed through to the output dataset unmodified. All extensions will be processed according to `default_keep_extensions`.
